Ok 👍, will have to wait and see what the future brings 🙂

Nah, it'd be a bonus if there was, but it's great already :3
i think most of the time
snakes are a bit harder to pull off

doesnt really bring much to the table
- scales
- fangs
- tails
There are many half human or human looking mythological things based on snakes
and majority of results in gacha games are like
very subtle, dont do the snake justice
Yeah but their whole race is very snake like in behavior and other things
The closest we got to snake theme is in Miryam
ye and myriam has very subtle details beside some hydras next to her
They base her of a hydra or sm, I forgot the lovecraftian source for her inspiration
maybe snakes dont really have many standout characteristics beside their tails
Also like yuan-ti in dnd that mix with humanoids are also very subtle
Meanwhile the bestial yuan-ti stay home ruling
maybe they are scared to make like
i know someone u would like Arcu
My current plan is in the dnd campaign I am in at some point do the ascension ritual of yuan-ti's somehow to change my feet for a tail :p, just for rp purposes and not to gain any bonuses
Morimens is more of a subtle horror kinda thing dev still want to appeal to anime crowd while still being able to nudge in their source
I love purple color and I have tinct, I'm satisfied spamming strikes for now

Aigis got stuffing for a brain and a worm live inside said stuffing, Thais got goat feet and use eyeballs as decoration, Liz is normal until u see the skulls in the smokes, Clem have a metal frame as a body, Hameln just use instruments, Daff got a midsection where u can literally see the background u set on home page where skin should be and she wear heads, etc
TLDR some unit here can look rather normal until u take a closer look in which case it’s a lot less normal <:scared1:1356053141816213507>
i still cant believe ppl saying

Yeah, I like these unique designs compared to the kinda somehow standardized designs in the 3d games <a:confuseddog:1214452923526815774>, is it part of being 3d or is it just 3d makers copying each other <:shruggingFrog:1379111039773311107>
I tried it, but it didn't catch me
I tried morimens, I've lost half days multiple times last week
"wait it's already midnight? But workday just ended"

R1999 is quirky and fun kind of weird in its art and design, Morimens is anime look normal for half the cast with some more in your face body horror like 24, faros & Caecus but it’s also mix with normal looking unit and the subtle body horror disguise as normal type
It’s more…gloomy in its art direction
Wow, I am really glad you enjoy it most people come in here see the ChatGPT, see the hard gameplay and run for the hills <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
morimens gameplay is where it truly shines
Well, I like rogue lites, I've been disappointed by many gachas tries on rogue lites because they are too easy
Arknight has nice rogue lite but it's sidecontent
Most gacha got a gameplay on the side we got a card game disguise as a gacha on the side
they want to be card game
if u play long enough, r1999 isnt a card game at all

Sofar only boss I had to use those death recovery items on was that rerun events last boss, and it's partially my fault for not reading enemy abilities more as it had been easy sofar for me, I've put some money on this game as I really want it to stay alive, but like, nothing more than a normal game would cost
if u like to enjoy some r1999, i can stream some
there is a reset and i havent done it
And I’m glad u enjoy it enough to start spending
